underlying_goal: Iteratively refine a Streamlit UI (dark mode, layout, spacing, icons) for PartClassifier, push to GitHub, and begin analyzing a second project (MathFire) to change a game progression setting
friction_detail: Light mode theme was so broken user asked to remove it entirely, and sidebar toggle broke because CSS hid the header element containing it.
brief_summary: User iteratively refined a Streamlit dark-mode UI (fixing icons, layout, spacing, sidebar), pushed to GitHub, added a footer, then started analyzing a second project for a config change — most tasks completed successfully despite some UI bugs.
